title: San Juan County, Washington - Private Property

sections.title: Emergency
sections.content:
**Property Address:** 667 Bear Cove Rd, Deer Harbor, WA 98243

**Status:** Documented

### Generator Instructions
![Generator Instructions](https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/113311765/FdqOlUIjWfQvyDzB.jpg)

**Steps to switch to generator power:**
1. Start generator (Located behind Camp Kitchen Shelter)
2. Turn off House Main Switch #1
3. Turn off main Switch on panel #2
4. Switch #3 Transfer Switch to Gen. set
5. Turn on House Main Switch #1
6. Turn on Main Switch on panel #2

**To switch back to OPALCO power:**
1. Turn off House Main Switch #1
2. Turn off main Switch on panel #2
3. Switch #3 Transfer Switch to OPALCO
4. Turn off generator
5. Turn on House Main Switch #1
6. Turn on Main Switch on panel #2

### Critical Contacts
- **Emergency:** 911
- **Caretaker (Joseph):** 360-982-9705
- **Caretaker (Lilliana):** 360-317-6121
- **Power (OPALCO):** 360-376-3500

sections.title: Farm House
sections.content:
**Parcel:** 260833006000 (23.74 acres - Shady Cove LLC) - [View on Polaris GIS](https://gis.sanjuancountywa.gov/polaris/)

### Structure & Exterior
- **Type:** Wood-frame farmhouse with traditional root cellar (built into hillside)
- **Exterior:** Wood siding with distinctive green/teal trim
- **Roof:** Gray asphalt shingles with dormers
- **Photo:** [Pending Upload]

### Kitchen Appliances
- **Refrigerator:** LG LRTP0931W (8.6 cu. ft. compact top-freezer) - *Rec. Replace: 2028*
  ![Refrigerator](https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/113311765/BSiJBYiUZYiFPEWd.jpg)
- **Range:** Premier Electric (4-burner coil cooktop)
- **Amenities:** No dishwasher, microwave, or laundry facilities

### Electrical System
- **Panel:** MTS electrical panel in dining room with generator transfer capability
- **Circuits:** Complete handwritten directory available
- **Photo:** [Pending Upload]

### Heating System
- **Type:** Electric baseboard heating (multiple zones)

### Septic System
- **Pump:** On "DINING - SEPTIC" circuit

### Water Heater
- **Model:** Bradford White MI150S6DS21
- **Serial:** ZB2783563
- **Age:** 25 years (Feb 2001)
- **Status:** CRITICAL FAILURE RISK (Expected life 8-12 years)
- **Action:** Replace immediately

subsections.title: Water Heater (Critical)
subsections.content:
### ⚠️ URGENT: Replacement Needed
**Bradford White Water Heater**
- **Model:** MI150S6DS21
- **Serial:** ZB2783563
- **Age:** 25 years (Feb 2001)
- **Status:** CRITICAL FAILURE RISK

**Why This Is Urgent:**
At 25 years old, this unit is more than double its expected lifespan. Risks include catastrophic tank failure, flooding, and safety hazards.

**Immediate Actions:**
1. Check daily for leaks.
2. Listen for unusual noises.
3. **Schedule replacement immediately.**

sections.content:

### Utilities & Systems

subsections.title: Water Heater (Critical)
subsections.content:
### ⚠️ URGENT: Replacement Needed
**Bradford White Water Heater**
- **Model:** M265R6DS-1NCWM
  ![Water Heater](https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/113311765/TVXbeLJBrtMTMeiC.jpg)
- **Serial:** DD9041943
- **Age:** 22 years (2004)
- **Status:** CRITICAL FAILURE RISK

**Why This Is Urgent:**
At 22 years old, this unit is significantly beyond its expected lifespan. Risks include tank failure, flooding, and loss of hot water.

**Immediate Actions:**
1. Monitor for leaks.
2. **Budget for immediate replacement.**

sections.title: Main House
sections.content:
**Status:** Partially Documented

### Irrigation System
- **Type:** Sprinkler system
- **Controller:** Rain Bird ESP-ME3
- **Location:** Wall-mounted cabinet
- **Features:** LNK WiFi Ready, Weather Sensor compatible, Seasonal Adjust, Flow Sensor compatible
- **Programs:** A, B, C, D
- **Current Status:** OFF (as of last photo)
- **Coverage:** Landscaping around Main House
- **Map:** Hand-drawn map available showing all head locations

### Electrical Systems
- **Entry Utility Room Panel:** [Photo Pending]
  *Contains Generator Transfer Switch and Fire Extinguisher.*
- **Basement Panel:** [Photo Pending]
  *QO Load Center with breakers for Heating, Water Heater, and Basement circuits.*
- **Main House Disconnect:** [Photo Pending]
  *Located in Camp Kitchen Utility Room.*
- **Service Type:** [Overhead/Underground]
- **Amperage:** [Amps]
- **Generator:** [Yes/No - Details if yes]
- **Solar Panels:** [Yes/No - Details if yes]

### Water Shutoff

  *Location and instructions to be documented.*
- **Exterior Spigots:** [Photo Pending]
